title: Junior Software Developer Intern

Full-time∙From May 18, 2026 to August 31, 2026

Job description

Company Overview

Are you a student or recent grad with a passion for meaningful tech? Join Clozure, Inc.—a mission-driven startup building the first-of-its-kind app for end-of-life planning. We're seeking a Summer Junior Software Developer Intern to help us enhance our mobile/web apps and backend systems. This is a unique chance to work on live technology that truly matters.

💡 What You’ll Gain:

Real-world development experience on a live product

Direct mentorship from our CTO and founding team

Flexible schedule that works around your classes

Equity in the company

Opportunity to grow with us long-term

🛠 What You’ll Do:

Build and test features for mobile/web (Flutter + Firebase)

Support automation with Odoo (Python-based ERP)

Contribute to UI/UX improvements and code reviews

Attend team stand-ups and document your work

Help shape product decisions with your ideas

👩‍💻 We’re Looking For:

CS or IT students/recent grads (or self-taught coders with grit)

Working knowledge of Flutter/Dart or eagerness to learn

Basic understanding of Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Functions)

Interest in backend systems like Python and Odoo

Strong problem-solving and collaboration skills

Passion for building technology that improves lives

🌟 Bonus Points:

Git/GitHub fluency

Startup or small team experience

UX/UI design familiarity

💼 This internship is eligible for school credit and includes equity as well as a small stipend. You’ll be joining a small, passionate team with a big vision—and the opportunity to leave your mark.

Process & Methodology

Follow Agile / Scrum methodology with 2-week sprints (or 1-week accelerated sprints when required).
Use JIRA for sprint planning, backlog grooming, and issue tracking.
Conduct regular sprint reviews and retrospectives to drive continuous improvement.
Collaborate with Product and Design in Figma to validate UI/UX before development.
Maintain up-to-date documentation and technical diagrams.

Expected Technical Proficiency

Deep experience with Firebase Auth, Firestore, and Cloud Functions.
Strong Flutter (Dart) development expertise.
Proficient in Node.js and Python.
Familiarity with Odoo module development and API integration.
Experience with authentication and role-based access control (RBAC).
CI/CD pipeline setup and maintenance.
Advanced Git version control practices (branching, reviews, tagging, hotfix workflows).

Leadership Expectations

Act as technical owner for all systems in production.
Communicate technical priorities and trade-offs clearly.
Proactively identify architectural improvements, scalability concerns, and security issues.
Balance short-term delivery with long-term technical vision.
Serve as the escalation point for major incidents or blockers.
Foster a culture of clean code, testing, and technical excellence.

Documentation & Reporting

Maintain updated architecture diagrams, API documentation, and runbooks.
Contribute to and maintain a centralized engineering knowledge base.
Ensure technical acceptance criteria are defined before development.
Provide regular technical updates and health checks during sprint reviews.

Success Criteria

Product features are delivered on time, stable, and scalable.
Technical debt is actively managed and documented.
Systems remain secure, performant, and well-instrumented.
Architecture supports sustainable growth.
Strong collaboration between engineering, product, and design teams.

Employment Terms

Position: Summer Junior Development Intern (Remote or in Austin, TX)
Reports To: Zeke Lara, Chief Technical Officer
Compensation: Earn equity in the company AND receive a cash stipend.
Start Date: May 2026
Work Arrangement: 100% Remote or in office in Austin, TX, if you'd prefer.

Clozure is the first end-of-life concierge company. We combine tech with trained concierges who help people navigate all the decisions that need to be made after the death of a loved one. Our app helps people pre-plan effectively so their loved ones can spend more time remembering the good times and less time cleaning up estate tasks. We're based in Austin, TX.
